slope_recompute_note: Recomputed 2026-07-09 directly from the committed fig7_lowphoton.csv (no rerun of simulate()). The original slopes were fit by filtering on lambda_bar_mean (<=32, <=16), but lambda_bar_mean drifts a hair above the nominal photon_budget (e.g. 32.00035 at budget=32, 16.000175 at budget=16) due to carrier-mean normalization, so that filter silently dropped the budget=32 and budget=16 endpoints from their respective fits. Refit by filtering directly on photon_budget in [2,32] and [1,16] (soft_log arm, log10(gain_rel_mse mean per budget) vs log10(photon_budget)); values above replace the stale -0.889/-0.647.
